rationale.R1.5: The reorganization of the section into a cleaner flow is mostly effective, but some logical gaps and unsupported claims are still present.
rationale.R1.7: The citation and scholarship aspects are partially addressed, but some items cannot be verified from the artifact alone.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is mostly handled, but some issues with confidence and missing evidence remain.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is generally good, but some minor drifts in scope are present.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is partially addressed, but some regressions and harmful patterns are still present.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are mostly handled, but some non-cosmetic changes lack annotation with source and reason.
